title: Approval of Debt Restructuring Plan
description: Board resolution approving the R254 billion government debt relief package and associated restructuring plan to improve Eskom's financial sustainability.

title: Medupi and Kusile Power Station Completion Plan
description: Approval of revised completion schedule and budget for Medupi and Kusile power stations, including remediation of boiler tube defects.

title: Renewable Energy Procurement Strategy
description: Approval of strategy to procure 5,000 MW of renewable energy from independent power producers to supplement generation capacity and reduce load-shedding.

title: Separation of Generation, Transmission and Distribution
description: Resolution approving the unbundling of Eskom into three separate entities as required by the Electricity Regulation Amendment Act.

title: Approval of Market Demand Strategy Revision
description: Board approval of revised Market Demand Strategy to address infrastructure backlogs and improve operational performance across rail, ports and pipelines.

title: Private Sector Participation in Rail Corridors
description: Approval of framework for private sector participation in the Ore Export Channel and Coal Export Channel rail corridors.

title: Locomotive Procurement Programme
description: Approval of emergency procurement of 100 additional locomotives to address critical shortage impacting freight volumes.

title: Takatso Consortium Equity Transaction Finalisation
description: Board resolution approving the finalisation of the 51% equity sale to the Takatso Consortium and associated shareholder agreement.

title: Fleet Expansion Plan 2024-2027
description: Approval of fleet expansion plan including acquisition of 10 new narrow-body aircraft to expand domestic and regional routes.

companyName: Passenger Rail Agency of South Africa
title: Rolling Stock Fleet Renewal Programme Phase 2
description: Approval of Phase 2 of the Rolling Stock Fleet Renewal Programme for procurement of 580 new train sets to replace aging Metrorail fleet.

companyName: Passenger Rail Agency of South Africa
title: Infrastructure Security Enhancement Programme
description: Approval of R2.5 billion programme to address cable theft, vandalism and security at rail infrastructure across all metropolitan areas.

title: Financial Rescue Plan Approval
description: Board approval of financial rescue plan including government recapitalisation of R3.4 billion and operational restructuring to restore Denel to financial viability.

title: Strategic Partnership with SAAB and Rheinmetall
description: Approval of strategic partnership agreements with SAAB (Sweden) and Rheinmetall (Germany) for technology transfer and joint development programmes.

companyName: South African Broadcasting Corporation SOC Limited
title: Digital Migration Strategy
description: Approval of strategy for migration from analogue to digital broadcasting in compliance with ITU deadlines and ICASA requirements.

companyName: South African Broadcasting Corporation SOC Limited
title: TV Licence Revenue Enhancement Plan
description: Approval of enhanced TV licence collection strategy and proposed legislative amendments to modernise the TV licence system.

companyName: Airports Company South Africa SOC Limited
title: O.R. Tambo International Airport Expansion Phase 3
description: Approval of R8.5 billion Phase 3 expansion of O.R. Tambo International Airport including new terminal capacity and runway upgrades.

companyName: Airports Company South Africa SOC Limited
title: King Shaka International Airport Cargo Hub Development
description: Approval of development of dedicated cargo hub at King Shaka International Airport to support KwaZulu-Natal logistics sector.
